name: school-queue
description: Queue management system for Al-Noor International School
author: Vyra Systems <asserhegazy@vyra-systems.com>

scripts.predev: powershell -Command "try { $p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop).OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Host 'Cleared port 3000' } catch { Write-Host 'Port 3000 free' }"
scripts.service:install: pm2 start src/backend/server.js --name schoolq --restart-delay 3000 && pm2 save && pm2 startup
scripts.predist: powershell -Command "try { $p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop).OwningProcess; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Host 'Stopped server on port 3000' } catch { Write-Host 'No server running on port 3000' }"
scripts.dist:server: npm run build:frontend && powershell -Command "$env:CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY='false'; $env:WIN_CSC_LINK=''; node node_modules/electron-builder/out/cli/cli.js --win --config config/eb-server.json"
scripts.dist:staff: npm run build:frontend && powershell -Command "$env:CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY='false'; $env:WIN_CSC_LINK=''; node node_modules/electron-builder/out/cli/cli.js --win --config config/eb-staff.json"
